query:
SELECT 
  'Total' as status, COUNT(*) as count FROM establishments
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Completos (visíveis)' as status, COUNT(*) as count FROM establishments 
WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND name != '' 
  AND address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' 
  AND neighborhood IS NOT NULL AND neighborhood != '' 
  AND phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != '' 
  AND instagram IS NOT NULL AND instagram != '' 
  AND hours IS NOT NULL AND hours != '' 
  AND hasMenu = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Incompletos (ocultos)' as status, COUNT(*) as count FROM establishments 
WHERE NOT (name IS NOT NULL AND name != '' 
  AND address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' 
  AND neighborhood IS NOT NULL AND neighborhood != '' 
  AND phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != '' 
  AND instagram IS NOT NULL AND instagram != '' 
  AND hours IS NOT NULL AND hours != '' 
  AND hasMenu = 1)
